---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Becky"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---
#libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(rtracklayer)
library(plotgardener)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(Biostrings)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
library(DESeq2)
library(edgeR)
library(ggrepel)
library(Seurat)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(tidyHeatmap)
library(reshape2)
library(colorspace)
library(circlize)
```

## MPRA output
### import data
```{r}
#import Neurons
bacmpra <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex01/MPRAflowCount_3reps/output_mpranalyze/Neurons/testEmpirical_alpha_RMHex01_Neurons_results_labeled_analysis2.tsv")

#extract start location
bacmpra <- bacmpra %>%
  mutate(start = as.integer(str_extract(label, "(?<=bin)\\d+")))
bacmpra$end <- bacmpra$start + 99
bacmpra$chr <- "chr17"
bacmprahits <- bacmpra %>% filter(pval.mad<=0.05)
bacmpra$score <- -log10(bacmpra$pval.mad)
bacmprasignal <- bacmpra %>% dplyr::select(chr, start, end, score)
bacmprasignal <- bacmprasignal %>% arrange(by=start)

gr_bacmpra <- GRanges(seqnames = bacmprahits$chr,
                      ranges = IRanges(start = bacmprahits$start,
                                       end = bacmprahits$end))
gr_bacmpra_reduce <- reduce(gr_bacmpra)


#import HEKs
hekbacmpra <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex01/MPRAflowCount_3reps/output_mpranalyze/HEK293FT/testEmpirical_alpha_RMHex01_HEK293FT_results_labeled_analysis2.tsv")
#extract start location
hekbacmpra <- hekbacmpra %>%
  mutate(start = as.integer(str_extract(label, "(?<=bin)\\d+")))
hekbacmpra$end <- hekbacmpra$start + 99
hekbacmpra$chr <- "chr17"

hekbacmprahits <- hekbacmpra %>% filter(pval.mad<=0.05)

gr_hekbacmpra <- GRanges(seqnames = hekbacmprahits$chr,
                      ranges = IRanges(start = hekbacmprahits$start,
                                       end = hekbacmprahits$end))
gr_hekbacmpra_reduce <- reduce(gr_hekbacmpra)

#join bacs and neurons into 1 tibble
bacmpra$group <- "neurons"
hekbacmpra$group <- "HEKs"

hekbacmpratemp <- hekbacmpra %>% dplyr::rename_with(~paste0("hek_", .), -label)
bacboth <- bacmpra %>% left_join(hekbacmpratemp, by="label")
bacboth <- bacboth %>% drop_na()
bacboth <- bacboth %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    hek_pval.mad <= 0.05 & pval.mad <= 0.05 ~ "sigboth",
    hek_pval.mad <= 0.05 ~ "sighek",
    pval.mad <= 0.05 ~ "signeuron",
    TRUE ~ "ns"
  ))
```

#### correlation plot of HEK and Neuron Hits
```{r}
baccorrplot <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha=0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
  #xlim(0, 15) +   # Set x-axis limits from 0 to 15
  #ylim(0, 15)
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_pval_mad.pdf", plot=baccorrplot, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

baccorrplotmad <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=mad.score, y=hek_mad.score, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha=0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.65, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.65, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons mad.score", y = "HEK293FT mad.score", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
  #xlim(0, 15) +   # Set x-axis limits from 0 to 15
  #ylim(0, 15)
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_madscore.pdf", plot=baccorrplotmad, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

baccorrplotcutoff <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha=0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  xlim(0, 15) +   
  ylim(0, 15)
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_pval_mad_cutoff.pdf", plot=baccorrplotcutoff, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

#testbac <- bacboth %>% dplyr::select(mad.score, hek_mad.score, group)
#testbac %>% filter(group=="sighek") %>% arrange(by=-hek_mad.score)


baccorrplot <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,15))
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_pval_mad2.pdf", plot=baccorrplot, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

baccorrplot <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,40)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,40))
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_pval_mad2_uncropped.pdf", plot=baccorrplot, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

baccorrplot <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,40))
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_pval_mad2_uncropped_notsamescale.pdf", plot=baccorrplot, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

bacboth <- bacboth %>%
  mutate(pval.mad = if_else(pval.mad < 2.2e-16, 2.2e-16, pval.mad))
bacboth <- bacboth %>%
  mutate(hek_pval.mad = if_else(hek_pval.mad < 2.2e-16, 2.2e-16, hek_pval.mad))
baccorrplot <- ggplot(bacboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c( "#66298E", "grey55", "#C873EF", "#C873EF")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,16)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,16))
ggsave(filename="bacmpra_celltypecorr_pval_mad2_uncropped_artlimitpval.pdf", plot=baccorrplot, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")
```

#### barplots of total hits per cell type
```{r}
#make count tibble
bactotal <- tibble(
  id = c("neuronhits", "neuronreduce", "hekhits", "hekreduce"),
  celltype = c("neurons", "neurons", "heks", "heks"),
  group = c("all", "reduced", "all", "reduced"),
  count = c(length(gr_bacmpra), length(gr_bacmpra_reduce), length(gr_hekbacmpra), length(gr_hekbacmpra_reduce))
)

# Set group order
bactotal$celltype <- factor(bactotal$celltype, levels = c("neurons", "heks"))

bactotalbar <- ggplot(bactotal, aes(x=celltype, y=count, fill=group)) +
  geom_bar(position=position_dodge(width=.8), stat="identity", color="#C873EF", width=0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#C873EF", "white")) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(filename="bactotalhits.pdf", plot=bactotalbar, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

```

## overlap of ENCODE CREs
```{r}
encodecres_gr <- GRanges(encodecres)
priority_levels <- c("PLS", "pELS", "dELS", "CA", "CA-CTCF","CA-H3K4me3", "CA-TF", "TF", "None")

gr_hekbacmpra_reduce$creType <- "None"
overlapheks <- findOverlaps(gr_hekbacmpra_reduce, encodecres_gr)
annot_df <- data.frame(peak_index = queryHits(overlapheks), annotation = encodecres_gr$creType[subjectHits(overlapheks)])
annot_df$priority <- match(annot_df$annotation, priority_levels)
final_annot <- annot_df %>% group_by(peak_index) %>% slice_min(order_by=priority, n=1) %>% ungroup()
gr_hekbacmpra_reduce$creType[final_annot$peak_index] <- final_annot$annotation

gr_bacmpra_reduce$creType <- "None"
overlapneur <- findOverlaps(gr_bacmpra_reduce, encodecres_gr)
annot_df_neur <- data.frame(peak_index = queryHits(overlapneur), annotation = encodecres_gr$creType[subjectHits(overlapneur)])
annot_df_neur$priority <- match(annot_df_neur$annotation, priority_levels)
final_annot_neur <- annot_df_neur %>% group_by(peak_index) %>% slice_min(order_by=priority, n=1) %>% ungroup()
gr_bacmpra_reduce$creType[final_annot_neur$peak_index] <- final_annot_neur$annotation


gr_hekhitstib <- as_tibble(gr_hekbacmpra_reduce)
gr_hekhitstib$group <- "HEK293FT"
gr_neuronhitstib <- as_tibble(gr_bacmpra_reduce)
gr_neuronhitstib$group <- "Neurons"

counttib_neurons <- gr_neuronhitstib %>%
  dplyr::count(creType, name = "count")
counttib_neurons <- counttib_neurons %>%
  mutate(fraction = count / sum(count))
counttib_neurons$group <- "Neurons"

counttib_heks <- gr_hekhitstib %>% dplyr::count(creType, name="count")
counttib_heks <- counttib_heks %>% mutate(fraction = count / sum(count))
counttib_heks$group <- "HEK293FT"

results_oligocombined <- rbind(counttib_heks, counttib_neurons)

# Set group order
results_oligocombined$group <- factor(results_oligocombined$group, levels = c("Neurons", "HEK293FT"))

hekneuronoligocrestack_fraction <- ggplot(results_oligocombined, aes(x=group, y=fraction, fill = fct_reorder(creType, fraction))) + 
  geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity", show.legend = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  ylab("Percent CRE Overlap") + 
  ggtitle("Overlap Count by CRE Type") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_list) +
  labs(fill = "Encode CREs") +
  #scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
ggsave(filename="creoverlap_reducedhits_bacmpra_heksandneurons_stackedbar_fraction4_reducedhitsashlynway.pdf", plot=hekneuronoligocrestack_fraction, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")


```

### import data - Neurons (one tailed test)
```{r}
#load neuron hits with scrambled
neurons <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex02/MPRAflowCount_reps123/output_mpranalyze/Neurons/testEmpirical_alpha_Neurons_results_labeled_prefilt_allcontrols_oneside.tsv")

neurons$neglog10pval <- -log10(neurons$pval.mad)
neurons_noscram <- neurons %>% filter(!str_detect(label, "scram"))
neurons_noscram$label2 <- neurons_noscram$label
#split up label column into usable chr, start, end info
neurons_noscram <- neurons_noscram %>% separate(label2, into = c("prefix", "chr", "pos"), sep = "::") 
neurons_noscram <- neurons_noscram %>% separate(chr, into = c("chr", "start"), sep = ":")
neurons_noscram<- neurons_noscram %>% separate(start, into = c("start", "end"), sep = "-")
neurons_noscram <- neurons_noscram %>% mutate(end = str_remove(end, "\\+$"))
#neurons_noscram <- neurons_noscram %>% dplyr::select(chr, start, end, mad.score, pval.mad, neglog10pval, label)
neurons_noscram <- neurons_noscram %>% arrange(by=start)
neurons_noscram$start <- as.integer(neurons_noscram$start)
neurons_noscram$end <- as.integer(neurons_noscram$end)

#neurons_noscram <- neurons_noscram %>% dplyr::select(chr, start, end, neglog10pval)
neurons_hits <- neurons_noscram %>% dplyr::select(chr, start, end, pval.mad)
neurons_hits <- neurons_hits %>% filter(pval.mad <=0.05)
neurons_hits <- neurons_hits %>% arrange(by=start)
neurons_hits01 <- neurons_noscram %>% dplyr::select(chr,start,end, pval.mad) %>%
  filter(pval.mad <= 0.01) %>%
  arrange(by=start)


gr_neuronhits <- GRanges(seqnames = neurons_hits$chr,
                      ranges = IRanges(start = as.numeric(neurons_hits$start),
                                       end = as.numeric(neurons_hits$end)))
gr_neuronhits_reduce <- GenomicRanges::reduce(gr_neuronhits)




#mean signal
avg_neurons <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex02/onesidedneurons3repswithcontrolsneglog10pval.sorted.mean.bed", col_names=c("chr", "start", "end", "neglog10pval"))
avg_neurons$start <- avg_neurons$start + 1
avg_neurons$score <- avg_neurons$neglog10pval

avg_neurons <- avg_neurons %>% arrange(by=start)
```

## import data -HEKs (one tailed test)
```{r}
#HEKs
#get rmhex02 hek hits, 3 reps, one sided test with negative controls
heks <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex02/MPRAflowCount_reps123/output_mpranalyze/HEK293FT/testEmpirical_alpha_HEK293FT_results_labeled_prefilt_allcontrols.tsv")

#remove scrambled sequences, if any were positive hits
heks_noscram <- heks %>% filter(!str_detect(label, "scram"))
#split up label column into usable chr, start, end info
heks_noscram$label2 <- heks_noscram$label
heks_noscram <- heks_noscram %>% separate(label2, into = c("prefix", "chr", "pos"), sep = "::") 
heks_noscram <- heks_noscram %>% separate(chr, into = c("chr", "start"), sep = ":")
heks_noscram <- heks_noscram %>% separate(start, into = c("start", "end"), sep = "-")
heks_noscram <- heks_noscram %>% mutate(end = str_remove(end, "\\+$"))

hek_hits <- heks_noscram %>% filter(pval.mad<=0.05)
gr_hekhits <- GRanges(seqnames = hek_hits$chr,
                      ranges = IRanges(start = as.numeric(hek_hits$start),
                                       end = as.numeric(hek_hits$end)))
gr_hekhits_reduce <- GenomicRanges::reduce(gr_hekhits)
```

#### combine hek and neuron data
```{r}
hekoligompratemp <- heks_noscram %>% dplyr::rename_with(~paste0("hek_", .), -label)
oligoboth <- neurons_noscram %>% left_join(hekoligompratemp, by="label")
oligoboth <- oligoboth %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    hek_pval.mad <= 0.05 & pval.mad <= 0.05 ~ "sigboth",
    hek_pval.mad <= 0.05 ~ "sighek",
    pval.mad <= 0.05 ~ "signeuron",
    TRUE ~ "ns"
  ))
#oligoboth <- oligoboth %>% drop_na()


```

# import other data
```{r}
bricrisprpos_noprom <- tibble(
  chr="chr17",
  start=c(45219248, 45241086, 45309310, 45428887, 45431544, 45848403, 45873588, 45940785, 45942182, 45971524),
  end=c(45219836, 45242238, 45309777, 45429757, 45432556, 45849786, 45874056, 45941252, 45942650, 45971991),
  name=c(-674458, -652338, -584456, -464677, -461949, -44905, -20178, 47019, 48416, 77758)
)
bricrisprpos_noprom$size <- bricrisprpos_noprom$end - bricrisprpos_noprom$start
bricrisprpos_noprom$start <- as.numeric(bricrisprpos_noprom$start)
bricrisprpos_noprom$end <- as.numeric(bricrisprpos_noprom$end)

variants1 <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex02/ADSP_chr17_variation_mpra_overlap_9-5-24.list.tsv", skip=3466)
variants1bed <- variants1 %>% dplyr::select('#CHROM', POS)
variants1bed$end <- variants1$POS + 1
variants1 <- variants1 %>% arrange(by=POS)

mapt_snmultiomics_brain <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/mapt_multiomics_brain.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr","start","end"))

maptluc <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/luciferaseregions.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr","start","end"))

maptcrispr <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/CRISPRguides.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr", "start", "end"))

maptcapturec_gluta <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/mapt_gluta_capturec.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr","start","end"))

mapt_snmultiomics_culture <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/mapt_multiomics_neurons.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr", "start", "end"))

mapt_hicgluta <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/mapt_hic_hiccups_gluta.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr", "start", "end"))

maptcapturec_gaba <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rogers2024supplementaldata/mapt_gaba_capturec.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr", "start", "end"))

beckycrispr <- read_tsv("/cluster/home/rhauser/files/rmhex02/CRISPRi/rmhex02crisprguidesfinal.bed", skip=1, col_names=c("chr", "start", "end", "region"))
```

### overlap of ENCODE CREs
```{r}
encodecres_gr <- GRanges(encodecres)
priority_levels <- c("PLS", "pELS", "dELS", "CA", "CA-CTCF","CA-H3K4me3", "CA-TF", "TF", "None")

gr_hekhits_reduce$creType <- "None"
overlapheks <- findOverlaps(gr_hekhits_reduce, encodecres_gr)
annot_df <- data.frame(peak_index = queryHits(overlapheks), annotation = encodecres_gr$creType[subjectHits(overlapheks)])
annot_df$priority <- match(annot_df$annotation, priority_levels)
final_annot <- annot_df %>% group_by(peak_index) %>% slice_min(order_by=priority, n=1) %>% ungroup()
gr_hekhits_reduce$creType[final_annot$peak_index] <- final_annot$annotation

gr_neuronhits_reduce$creType <- "None"
overlapneur <- findOverlaps(gr_neuronhits_reduce, encodecres_gr)
annot_df_neur <- data.frame(peak_index = queryHits(overlapneur), annotation = encodecres_gr$creType[subjectHits(overlapneur)])
annot_df_neur$priority <- match(annot_df_neur$annotation, priority_levels)
final_annot_neur <- annot_df_neur %>% group_by(peak_index) %>% slice_min(order_by=priority, n=1) %>% ungroup()
gr_neuronhits_reduce$creType[final_annot_neur$peak_index] <- final_annot_neur$annotation


gr_hekhitstib <- as_tibble(gr_hekhits_reduce)
gr_hekhitstib$group <- "HEK293FT"
gr_neuronhitstib <- as_tibble(gr_neuronhits_reduce)
gr_neuronhitstib$group <- "Neurons"

counttib_neurons <- gr_neuronhitstib %>%
  dplyr::count(creType, name = "count")
counttib_neurons <- counttib_neurons %>%
  mutate(fraction = count / sum(count))
counttib_neurons$group <- "Neurons"

counttib_heks <- gr_hekhitstib %>% dplyr::count(creType, name="count")
counttib_heks <- counttib_heks %>% mutate(fraction = count / sum(count))
counttib_heks$group <- "HEK293FT"

results_oligocombined <- rbind(counttib_heks, counttib_neurons)

# Set group order
results_oligocombined$group <- factor(results_oligocombined$group, levels = c("Neurons", "HEK293FT"))

hekneuronoligocrestack_fraction <- ggplot(results_oligocombined, aes(x=group, y=fraction, fill = fct_reorder(creType, fraction))) + 
  geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity", show.legend = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  ylab("Percent CRE Overlap") + 
  ggtitle("Overlap Count by CRE Type") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_list) +
  labs(fill = "Encode CREs") +
  #scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
ggsave(filename="creoverlap_reducedhits_oligompra_heksandneurons_stackedbar_fraction4_reducedhitsashlynway.pdf", plot=hekneuronoligocrestack_fraction, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

```


#### correlation plot of Neurons and HEKs hits
```{r}
oligocellcorr <- ggplot(oligoboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha=0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c("#27706E","gray55", "#4FE0DC", "#4FE0DC")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave(filename="oligompra_celltypecorr_pval_mad.pdf", plot=oligocellcorr, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

oligocellcorrmad <- ggplot(oligoboth, aes(x=mad.score, y=hek_mad.score, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha=0.4) +
  #geom_vline(xintercept = 1.6, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1.96, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c("#027C89","gray55", "#4FE0DC", "#4FE0DC")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons mad.score", y = "HEK293FT mad.score", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave(filename="oligompra_celltypecorr_madscore_nodottedline.pdf", plot=oligocellcorrmad, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

oligobothtest <- oligoboth %>% dplyr::select(label, group, mad.score, hek_mad.score)
oligobothtest <- oligobothtest %>% filter(group=="signeuron")
oligobothtest %>% arrange(by=-mad.score)
summary(oligobothtest)

oligocellcorrcutoff <- ggplot(oligoboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha=0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c("#27706E","gray55", "#4FE0DC", "#4FE0DC")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10))
ggsave(filename="oligompra_celltypecorr_pval_cutoff.pdf", plot=oligocellcorrcutoff, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

oligoboth <- oligoboth %>%
  mutate(pval.mad = if_else(pval.mad < 2.2e-16, 2.2e-16, pval.mad))
oligoboth <- oligoboth %>%
  mutate(hek_pval.mad = if_else(hek_pval.mad < 2.2e-16, 2.2e-16, hek_pval.mad))
oligocellcorrcutoff <- ggplot(oligoboth, aes(x=-log10(pval.mad), y=-log10(hek_pval.mad), color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +  
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
 scale_color_manual(values = c("#27706E","gray55", "#4FE0DC", "#4FE0DC")) +
  labs(x = "Neurons -log10(pval.mad)", y = "HEK293FT -log10(pval.mad)", title = "MPRA Correlation\nNeurons vs. HEK293FT") + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,16)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits=c(0,16))
ggsave(filename="oligompra_celltypecorr_pval_mad2_uncropped_artlimitpval.pdf", plot=oligocellcorrcutoff, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

```
#### barplots of total hits per cell type
```{r}
#make count tibble
oligototal <- tibble(
  id = c("neuronhits", "neuronreduce", "hekhits", "hekreduce"),
  celltype = c("neurons", "neurons", "heks", "heks"),
  group = c("all", "reduced", "all", "reduced"),
  count = c(length(gr_neuronhits), length(gr_neuronhits_reduce), length(gr_hekhits), length(gr_hekhits_reduce))
)

#set order
oligototal$celltype <- factor(oligototal$celltype, levels = c("neurons", "heks"))

oligototalbar <- ggplot(oligototal, aes(x=celltype, y=count, fill=group)) +
  geom_bar(position=position_dodge(width=.8), stat="identity", color="#4FE0DC", width=0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#4FE0DC", "white")) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(filename="oligototalhits.pdf", plot=oligototalbar, width=4.44, height=4.44, units="in")

```

#### plot gardener track of crispr pos region (region #18), one tailed p0.05, line at pvalue of 0.05
```{r}
#region 18
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="region18_onetailedp05_sigline.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides = FALSE, bg = NA)

pageGuideHide()


#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45779500, chromend = 45782500, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")



#plot variation
#plotRanges(data = variants1bed, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .5, height = .3, collapse = TRUE, fill = "#F433AB")

#plot CRISPR guides
plotRanges(data = beckycrispr, params = params_a, collapse = TRUE, y = 1, height = 0.25, boxHeight=0.25, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot promoter capturec
plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.2, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold <- -log10(0.05)
#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 2, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,3), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)

geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()
```

#### plot gardener track of crispr region 5 - one tailed p05, sig line
```{r}
#region 5
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="region5_onetailedp05_sigline.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45821000, chromend = 45823000, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")



#plot variation
#plotRanges(data = variants1bed, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .5, height = .3, collapse = TRUE, fill = "#F433AB")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot CRISPR guides
plotRanges(data = beckycrispr, params = params_a, collapse = TRUE, y = 1, height = 0.25, boxHeight=0.25, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot promoter capturec
plotRanges(data = mapt_hicgluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 2, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,4), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()
```

#### plot gardener region 9
```{r}
#region 9
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="region9_onetailedp05_sigline.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 46036535, chromend = 46039410, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")



#plot variation
#plotRanges(data = variants1bed, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .5, height = .3, collapse = TRUE, fill = "#F433AB")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot CRISPR guides
plotRanges(data = beckycrispr, params = params_a, collapse = TRUE, y = 1, height = 0.25, boxHeight=0.25, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot promoter capturec
#plotRanges(data = mapt_hicgluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold <- -log10(0.05)
#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 2, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,6), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()
```

#### plot gardener region 8
```{r}
#### plot gardener track of crispr region 5 - one tailed p05, sig line
#region 8
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="/cluster/home/rhauser/files/graphs/paperfigures/region8_onetailedp05_sigline.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 46029900, chromend = 46031100, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")



#plot variation
#plotRanges(data = variants1bed, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .5, height = .3, collapse = TRUE, fill = "#F433AB")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot CRISPR guides
plotRanges(data = beckycrispr, params = params_a, collapse = TRUE, y = 1, height = 0.25, boxHeight=0.25, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot promoter capturec
plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold <- -log10(0.05)

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 2, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,10), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()
```

####mapt prom region plotgardener
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="maptprom_onetailedp05_sigline.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45893536, chromend = 45895535, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot variation
#plotRanges(data = variants1bed, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .5, height = .3, collapse = TRUE, fill = "#F433AB")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot CRISPR guides
#plotRanges(data = beckycrispr, params = params_a, collapse = TRUE, y = 1, height = 0.25, boxHeight=0.25, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot promoter capturec
#plotRanges(data = mapt_hicgluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = cappedsignal, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,15), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

####bri region 45428787_45429857
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45428787_45429857.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45428787, chromend = 45429857, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = -0.3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_brain, params = params_a, order.="random", y = -0.1, height = 0.75, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot maptcapturec_gluta
plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.1, height = .75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = -0.5, height = .75, fill = "#037971")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.25, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,2), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

baclogplot <- plotSignal(data = bacmprasignal, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 2.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#1c9c98", line = "#1c9c98")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=baclogplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = baclogplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,1.5), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 3.0, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()

```

####bri region 45848303_45849886
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45848303_45849886.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45848303, chromend = 45849886, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_brain, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,4), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

####bri region 45873488_45874156
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45873488_45874156.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45873488, chromend = 45874156, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,3), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

####bri region 45940685_45941352
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45940685_45941352.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45940685, chromend = 45941352, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_brain, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,2), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45942082_45942750.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45942082, chromend = 45942750, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_brain, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,4), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)

#making gene plot

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()
```

####bri region 45971424_45972091
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45971424_45972091.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45971424, chromend = 45972091, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gaba, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = avg_neurons, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,3.5), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

####bri region 45431444_45432656
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45431444_45432656.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45431444, chromend = 45432656, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_brain, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = bacmprasignal, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,1.5), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

####bri region 45219148_45219936
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45219148_45219936.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45219148, chromend = 45219936, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gaba, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot luciferase
#plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657
plotRanges(data = mapt_hicgluta, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.9, height = 0.75, fill = "#D88C9A")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gluta, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#6852A3")

#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = bacmprasignal, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 2.25, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
annoYaxis(plot = oligologplot,axisLine = TRUE, at=c(0,1.5), fontsize = 8, digits=3)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()


```

####bri region 45240986_45242338
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45240986_45242338.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45240986, chromend = 45242338, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_culture, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = mapt_snmultiomics_brain, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#d88c9a")
#861657


#plot mpra data
#plotRanges(data = neurons_hits, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 1.1, height = .75, fill = "#86EAE6")

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cap signal
#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = bacmprasignal, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")
annoSegments(
  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)

#plot cCres
#plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = "#F2D0A9")
plotRanges(data = encodecres, params = params_a, order. ="width", collapse=TRUE, y = 2.75, height = .075, fill = encodecres$hexcolor)


geneHighlights <- data.frame("geneName" = c("MAPT"), "color" = c("black"))

#making gene plot
plotGenes(params = params_a, stroke =0.5, fontsize = 8, strandLabels = TRUE, y = 3, height =1, geneHighlights = geneHighlights, geneBackground = "black")

plotGenomeLabel(params = params_a, y =4, length = 5, scale = "bp", commas=TRUE)

dev.off()
```

####bri region 45309210_45309877
```{r}
#un-comment to save as a pdf in working directory labeled Rplots.pdf
pdf(file="plotgardenerbri45309210_45309877.pdf", width = 8, height = 4.25, onefile=FALSE)

## Create a plotgardener page
pageCreate(width = 8, height = 4.25, default.units = "inches", showGuides=FALSE, bg=NA)

pageGuideHide()

#set general parameters
params_a <- pgParams(chrom = "chr17", chromstart = 45309210, chromend = 45309877, assembly = "hg38", x = 1.5, width =5, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")


 
#plot bricrispr
plotRanges(data = bricrisprpos_noprom, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = .3, height = .75, fill = "#0D3B66")

#neeed to remove one crispr guide
#plot mapt_snmultiomics_brain
#plotRanges(data = maptcapturec_gaba, params = params_a, order.="random", y = 0.5, height = 0.75, fill = "#8E7DBE")

#plot luciferase
plotRanges(data = maptluc, params = params_a, order. ="random", y = 0.7, height = .75, fill = "#037971")
#861657


#plot mpra data

threshold = -log10(0.05)

#cappedsignal <- avg_neurons %>% mutate(score=pmin(score, 15))

#plot ompra
oligologplot <- plotSignal(data = bacmprasignal, params = params_a, negData = TRUE, y = 1.75, height = 0.75, fill = "#86EAE6", line = "#86EAE6")

  x0=unit(0, "npc"), y0=threshold,
  x1=unit(1, "npc"), y1=threshold,
  plot=oligologplot, default.units="native",
  linecolor = "grey40", lty=2
)
```
